title: Morocco 4-2 Haití: results, summary and goals
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Attempt missed. Ricardo Adé (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Frantzdy Pierrot.

Attempt blocked. Louicius Deedson (Haiti) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Frantzdy Pierrot with a headed pass.

Sofyan Amrabat went off injured after Morocco had used all subs.

Delay in match because of an injury Sofyan Amrabat (Morocco).

Attempt blocked. Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (Haiti) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Dominique Simon with a cross.

Corner, Haiti. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.

Attempt saved. Duckens Nazon (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco).

Duckens Nazon (Haiti) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Josué Casimir (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Gessime Yassine (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Dominique Simon (Haiti) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

Goal! Morocco 4, Haiti 2. Gessime Yassine (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Soufiane Rahimi.

Attempt blocked. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Johny Placide.

Attempt saved. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the left is saved in the top centre of the goal by Johny Placide (Haiti).

Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.

Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (Haiti) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Sofyan Amrabat (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Substitution, Haiti. Frantzdy Pierrot replaces Lenny Joseph.

Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Neil El Aynaoui.

Substitution, Morocco. Noussair Mazraoui replaces Anass Salah-Eddine.

Substitution, Haiti. Dominique Simon replaces Danley Jean Jacques.

Substitution, Haiti. Carlens Arcus replaces Jean-Kévin Duverne.

Duckens Nazon (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.

Johny Placide (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.

Goal! Morocco 3, Haiti 2. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Chadi Riad following a corner.

Attempt missed. Chadi Riad (Morocco) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross following a corner.

Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Martin Expérience.

Attempt blocked. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross.

Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Ricardo Adé.

Attempt blocked. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Anass Salah-Eddine (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Offside, Morocco. Redouane Halhal is caught offside.

Substitution, Morocco. Gessime Yassine replaces Ayoub El Kaabi.

Substitution, Morocco. Azzedine Ounahi replaces Brahim Díaz.

Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari.

Ayoub El Kaabi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Substitution, Haiti. Louicius Deedson replaces Wilson Isidor.

Substitution, Haiti. Duckens Nazon replaces Ruben Providence.

Wilson Isidor (Haiti) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Attempt blocked. Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (Haiti) right footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the left is blocked.

Ruben Providence (Haiti) wins a free kick on the left wing.

Redouane Halhal (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Martin Expérience (Haiti) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Attempt saved. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Johny Placide (Haiti).

Offside, Morocco. Ayoub El Kaabi is caught offside.

Delay in match because of an injury Josué Casimir (Haiti).

Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Jean-Kévin Duverne.

Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.

Attempt saved. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Johny Placide (Haiti). Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross.

Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.

Attempt saved. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Johny Placide (Haiti). Assisted by Ismael Saibari.

Attempt missed. Brahim Díaz (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses the top right corner. Assisted by Anass Salah-Eddine.

Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Goal! Morocco 2, Haiti 2. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Goal! Morocco 1, Haiti 2. Wilson Isidor (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Jean-Kévin Duverne.

Redouane Halhal (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Goal! Morocco 1, Haiti 1. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.

Attempt missed. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a cross.

Ismael Saibari (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Attempt saved. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Johny Placide (Haiti). Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.

Josué Casimir (Haiti) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Attempt missed. Ayoub El Kaabi (Morocco) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross.

Attempt missed. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

Offside, Morocco. Ismael Saibari is caught offside.

Attempt blocked. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.

Attempt missed. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.

Attempt saved. Ayoub El Kaabi (Morocco) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is saved in the top right corner by Johny Placide (Haiti). Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

Own Goal by Yassine Bounou, Morocco. Morocco 0, Haiti 1.

Attempt missed. Lenny Joseph (Haiti) right footed shot from very close range is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Jean-Kévin Duverne.

Attempt missed. Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses the top left corner from a direct free kick.

Lenny Joseph (Haiti) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
